class.name: EffectArray
class.brief_description: Helper class that stores an array of the post-process effects.
class.description: Helper class that stores an array of the [b]BaseShader[/b]-derived post-process effects, used both in-game and in the editor UI.

methods.method:
<param index="0" name="effect" type="Ref"/>
Function that can be called to add a [b]BaseShader[/b]-derived class to the [b]EffectArray[/b].

<param index="0" name="effect" type="Ref"/>
Function that can be called to remove a [b]BaseShader[/b]-derived class from the [b]EffectArray[/b].

method.name: remove_effect
method.description: Function that can be called to remove a [b]BaseShader[/b]-derived class from the [b]EffectArray[/b], but by indexing into the array.

members.member: An array of type [b]BaseShader[/b], which may include derived classes from [b]BaseShader[/b]. This can be used both in-game but also for the GodotStylizedShadersPlugin editor UI.
